tools.name: get_rr_score
tools.description: Free-subset Re-Rate (RR) Score projection for one junior precious-metals miner: overall 9-factor score, the nine factor scores, DQS, stage, jurisdiction, and 2028/2029 RR projections. Analytical, not a recommendation.

tools.name: list_tickers
tools.description: Every ticker symbol in the Gold Silver Analytics free-subset coverage universe (~279), plus the count. Symbols only — no scores.

tools.name: search_tickers
tools.description: Fuzzy lookup: returns free-subset rows whose ticker symbol or company name contains the query (case-insensitive). For structured filter/rank, use get_screen_data instead.

tools.name: get_screen_data
tools.description: Structured screen over the free-subset feed: optionally filter by metal (Au/Ag), jurisdiction (country), and stage (DEVELOPER/PRODUCER/HYBRID/EXPLORER/RESOURCE_ACQ), optionally sort by 2028 RR Score descending, and cap with limit. An analytical ranked classification — never a 'best stock' list.

findings.title: Tool description changed since last scan
findings.detail: Tool "get_screen_data" changed its description with no version change. Silent description changes are how a trusted server turns malicious after review.

evidence.snippet: before: "(hash f056c323)" → after: "Structured screen over the free-subset feed: optionally filter by metal (Au/Ag), jurisdiction (country), and stage (DEVELOPER/PRODUCER/HYBRID/EXPLORER/RESOURCE_ACQ), optionally sort by 2028 RR Score descending, and cap with limit. An analytical ranked classification — never a 'best stock' list."

findings.remediation: Re-review the tool before continuing to trust it.
